name: PSYKE Outline Templates
description: PSYKE-aware outline structuring plugin using narrative templates from classical, modern, alternative, and genre-specific writing methods.
author: OpenAI

default_method.description: Fallback outline method when none is requested.

selection_mode.description: How the plugin chooses a narrative structure template.

emit_actions.description: Emit connector-friendly actions for outline persistence.

max_candidates.description: Maximum number of recommended alternative methods.

include_psyke_annotations.description: Attach PSYKE entities, arcs, goals, themes, and tensions to beats.

include_guidance.description: Include method-specific guidance text for each beat.

chapter_expansion.description: Expand beat structures into chapter-sized outline nodes where supported.
